key_themes: Product quality and accuracy of descriptions
business_context.analysis_summary: This is an online retail store where customers appreciate fast delivery and good product quality but frequently encounter issues with inaccurate product descriptions, complicated returns, website glitches, and inconsistent customer support.

pain_clusters.root_cause: Website photos do not accurately represent product color or material quality.
supporting_reviews: The product photos on the website are very misleading. The colour is completely different in person and the material feels much cheaper than it looks online. Returning it.
Size guide was completely wrong. Ordered my usual size and it was two sizes too small. The guide says the item runs large but it runs tiny. Cost me money to return.
Product description said compatible with all major devices. It is not compatible with mine and there is no clear list of compatible devices anywhere on the page. False advertising.
Ordered two weeks ago and the item still has not arrived. Tracking shows it has been sitting in a warehouse for 10 days. Customer service just copy-paste the same response each time I contact them.
Return process was a nightmare. I had to print a label, find a drop-off point, and wait three weeks for the refund. Other retailers do this in a couple of days.
Payment page kept timing out. Tried three times over two days before it finally went through. Meanwhile the item went out of stock and I had to wait for a restock.

pain_clusters.root_cause: System glitches prevent automatic application of loyalty points, requiring manual intervention and causing delays.
supporting_reviews: Loyalty points were not applied to my last order even though I was logged in. Contacted support and they said the system had a glitch. Took a week to get the points manually added.
Discount code I received by email did not work at checkout. There was no clear explanation of why. I ended up paying full price because I wanted the item and the sale ended that day.

recommendations.recommendation: Update all product images to ensure accurate representation of color and material, including adding customer-uploaded photos and 360-degree views.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduces customer disappointment and returns, increases trust and conversion rates during product discovery.
recommendations.evidence: "The color was completely different from what I saw online."

recommendations.recommendation: Implement a quality assurance process for new product listings, requiring visual verification by staff before publishing.
recommendations.expected_impact: Prevents future inaccuracies in product visuals, maintaining consistency and reliability.
recommendations.evidence: "Material looked much cheaper in person than in the photos."

recommendations.recommendation: Fix the loyalty points system glitch and introduce automated monitoring to flag failed point applications in real time.
recommendations.expected_impact: Improves post-purchase satisfaction, reduces manual interventions, and builds loyalty.
recommendations.evidence: "I had to contact support because my points didn’t show up after my order."

recommendations.recommendation: Proactively notify customers when loyalty points are successfully applied or if there is a delay, including estimated resolution times.
recommendations.expected_impact: Enhances transparency and reduces customer frustration during post-purchase.
recommendations.evidence: "It took days to get my points and I wasn’t sure what was happening."

recommendations.recommendation: Conduct a root cause analysis and customer journey mapping for 'Issue group 2' to clarify the pain point and design targeted interventions.
recommendations.expected_impact: Enables precise resolution of the most frequent medium-severity issue, improving overall CX.
recommendations.evidence: 5 reviews mention this issue, but details are unclear.

evaluation.critique: Evaluation parse error, approving by default.
